content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad market is constructive: Nifty +0.55%, Pharma +2.59%, IT +2.05%, Metal +1.86%, Energy +1.25%. VIX cooling -4.41% to 18.84 supports risk-on. Book is already 49% deployed with multiple positions in profit; focus is on managing winners (trail SLs) rather than aggressive new adds.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24150
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 77.50,
      "new_target": 85.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Holding at -2.5% but Q4 results were strong (PAT +35% YoY, GNPA 1.45%) and PSU bank sector firm. Stock bounced today +1.96% off support. Keep SL at 77.50 (just below S2 76.95 buffer not needed). Actually keeping unchanged — emit HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact: strong Q4, sector firm, stock recovering today. SL 77.50 sits just below S2 (76.95-78.36 zone). Hold and watch for follow-through toward 82+."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.47,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +6.2%; SL already moved to 1035.47 (above entry 984). Currently CMP 1045 — SL is above entry locking in ~5.2%. No-op MODIFY since values match stored — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at -0.3%. Hedge thesis intact; gold consolidating after strong FY26 run. SL at 119 (~4.9% below entry) appropriate for ETF hedge. No change warranted."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "new_target": 1480.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op — values unchanged. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +3.0%, SL 694.48 already above entry 681 (locked +2%). Q4 results Apr 29 (2 days) — binary risk. SL placement is correct. Hold into results; if it gaps up, will re-evaluate."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.9%, recovering. Q4 results Apr 30 (3 days) — binary event. SL at 2260 (4.7% below entry) appropriate given event risk. Hold; do not tighten ahead of binary catalyst."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 401.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op — values match. Emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT 110x @ 443 still working. Do not stack. Letting it sit; energy/power cluster already exposed via NTPC."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "JSWSTEEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "JSWSTEEL at all-time high 1296 right at upper Bollinger band, results Apr 29 (2 days) — chasing into binary event with consensus targets BELOW current price is poor RR. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HSCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+23% in 4 sessions, today's intraday range 544-583 shows extreme volatility (10.6x volume but wild whipsaw). Overextended; chasing into volatility is poor RR. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "IDBI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Privatization-driven binary stock; FM comments only directional, no concrete EoIs. Volatile (+8% intraday range to -45% from Jan high). Already exposed to PSU bank via MAHABANK. Pass."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 77.50 below S2; thesis intact; strong Q4 backdrop. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1035.47 (above entry); locking ~5%. Target 1100 still ~5% above CMP. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; minor drawdown; SL appropriate for ETF."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1418 = breakeven+. CMP 1419, just above SL — already at tight breakeven trail. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 694.48 already locks +2% above entry; near 52w high; results Apr 29 binary. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 Apr 30 binary; SL 2260 gives room through event. Do not tighten pre-event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 401 = breakeven-ish (entry 404.50). Already trailed near breakeven. Near 52w high; let it run."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "JSWSTEEL — wait for Q4 print Apr 29; if guidance strong and stock holds 1280, consider entry on retest. HSCL — wait for consolidation and retest of 540-550 zone before considering. IDBI — wait for concrete privatization EoI news. AXISBANK at -3.65% selloff — would want stabilization before value entry. SUNPHARMA Organon deal — already priced in +9% gap, wait for retracement.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 49% deployed with +0.39% session P&L; 4 of 7 holdings in profit. Two binary catalysts in next 3 days (GRANULES Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 30) — SLs already positioned appropriately. TATAPOWER LIMIT @ 443 still pending; not stacking. Heading into binary earnings cluster, defensive disposition is correct — preserve gains, no new chases at 52w highs. Win rate is concerning at 5% over 5 days but profit factor 1.4x suggests winners are larger than losers; need to be more selective on entries."
}
